strict-transport-security.name: Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS)
strict-transport-security.description: Enforces HTTPS connections, prevents downgrade attacks

content-security-policy.name: Content-Security-Policy (CSP)
content-security-policy.description: Prevents XSS, clickjacking, and other code injection attacks
content-security-policy.recommendation: Define a strict CSP that limits script sources. At minimum: default-src 'self'

x-frame-options.name: X-Frame-Options
x-frame-options.description: Prevents clickjacking by controlling iframe embedding

referrer-policy.name: Referrer-Policy
referrer-policy.description: Controls how much referrer information is shared with other sites

permissions-policy.name: Permissions-Policy
permissions-policy.description: Controls which browser features and APIs can be used
permissions-policy.recommendation: Restrict unused features: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

x-xss-protection.name: X-XSS-Protection
x-xss-protection.description: Legacy XSS filter (modern browsers use CSP instead)

server.name: Server
server.description: Reveals server software and version, aiding targeted attacks
server.recommendation: Remove or obscure the Server header

x-powered-by.name: X-Powered-By
x-powered-by.description: Reveals backend framework/language, aiding targeted attacks
